query:
SELECT 
  s.externalId as serviceId,
  s.planName,
  s.monthlyCost as supplierCost,
  s.customerExternalId,
  sba.billingItemExternalId as currentMatchedBiId,
  bi_current.description as currentBiDesc,
  bi_current.lineAmount as currentRevenue,
  bi_correct.externalId as correctBiId,
  bi_correct.description as correctBiDesc,
  bi_correct.lineAmount as correctRevenue
FROM services s
JOIN service_billing_assignments sba ON sba.serviceExternalId = s.externalId
JOIN billing_items bi_current ON bi_current.externalId = sba.billingItemExternalId
JOIN (
  SELECT bi2.customerExternalId, bi2.externalId, bi2.description, bi2.lineAmount
  FROM billing_items bi2
  WHERE bi2.description LIKE '%SIP%' OR bi2.description LIKE '%Users%' OR bi2.description LIKE '%PBX%'
) bi_correct ON bi_correct.customerExternalId = s.customerExternalId 
  AND bi_correct.lineAmount > bi_current.lineAmount
  AND (bi_correct.description LIKE '%SIP%' OR bi_correct.description LIKE '%Users%')
WHERE s.externalId IN ('S8JR3KM','SHB64AC','S72C54J','SHU42OX','SGVQT30','S1UMC04','SEEV150','SKY3MLC','SSE3JV7','SZR96SE','SGBHVJV','S66U54A')
ORDER BY s.externalId, bi_correct.lineAmount DESC;

SELECT 
  s.externalId as serviceId,
  s.planName,
  s.monthlyCost as supplierCost,
  s.customerExternalId,
  sba.billingItemExternalId as currentMatchedBiId,
  bi_current.description as currentBiDesc,
  bi_current.lineAmount as currentRevenue,
  bi_correct.externalId as correctBiId,
  bi_correct.description as correctBiDesc,
  bi_correct.lineAmount as correctRevenue
FROM services s
JOIN service_billing_assignments sba ON sba.serviceExternalId = s.externalId
JOIN billing_items bi_current ON bi_current.externalId = sba.billingItemExternalId
JOIN (
  SELECT bi2.customerExternalId, bi2.externalId, bi2.description, bi2.lineAmount
  FROM billing_items bi2
  WHERE bi2.description LIKE '%SIP%' OR bi2.description LIKE '%Users%' OR bi2.description LIKE '%PBX%'
) bi_correct ON bi_correct.customerExternalId = s.customerExternalId 
  AND bi_correct.lineAmount > bi_current.lineAmount
  AND (bi_correct.description LIKE '%SIP%' OR bi_correct.description LIKE '%Users%')
WHERE s.externalId IN ('S8JR3KM','SHB64AC','S72C54J','SHU42OX','SGVQT30','S1UMC04','SEEV150','SKY3MLC','SSE3JV7','SZR96SE','SGBHVJV','S66U54A')
ORDER BY s.externalId, bi_correct.lineAmount DESC;
